## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::WebhookOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        WebhookOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
push api, interface, callback

## Categories
development, social, account
